text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I guess that was okay...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I really wanted to get first place for all the
younger students who came to watch me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I guess I've still got a ways to go...
choice_data_list: It wasn't a bad performance at all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heh, thanks for trying to make me feel better.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ugh, but I shouldn't be making you worry.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right! Next time, I'm going to turn it up to eleven, keep up the pace, and win!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Losing all the time is definitely not my bag!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll give everyone a real taste of my speed next
time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Now we just need to take a refreshing drive!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's ride Tata all the way to the beach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accompany Maruzensky on a drive along the
coast until she feels better.
